info.title: Multi-Tenant Express API
info.description: Multi-tenant REST API with Organization → Project → Resource hierarchy, RBAC permissions, and invitation system.

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Custom role and permission management within organizations

tags.name: Invitations
tags.description: Invite users to organizations and projects

post.description: Register a new user account with username and password.

Authenticate with credentials. Server sets httpOnly cookies (access_token, refresh_token). After 5 consecutive failed attempts the account is locked for 15 minutes — locked accounts receive the same 401 response as invalid credentials to prevent enumeration.

200.description: Authentication successful. Auth tokens are set as httpOnly cookies.

get.description: Verify cookie validity and return the authenticated user's profile. Used by clients to check session status on startup.

post.description: Rotate tokens — revokes the current refresh token cookie and sets new httpOnly cookies.

200.description: Token refreshed successfully. New auth cookies are set.

Set-Cookie.description: Rotated httpOnly auth cookies (access_token and refresh_token)

post.description: Revoke the current refresh token. Idempotent — returns success even if the token is already revoked or missing.

200.description: Logged out successfully. Auth cookies are cleared.

post.description: Create a new organization. The authenticated user becomes the owner.

get.description: Retrieve all organizations the authenticated user belongs to.
Retrieve details of a specific organization.

put.description: Update an organization's name or description.

delete.description: Delete an organization. Only the owner can perform this action.

get.description: Retrieve all members of an organization with their roles.

put.description: Update the role of an organization member.

delete.description: Remove a member from the organization.

post.description: Create a new project within an organization.

get.description: Retrieve projects within an organization. Owners and admins see all projects; other members see only projects they belong to.
Retrieve details of a specific project.

put.description: Update a project's name or description.

delete.description: Delete a project and all its resources.

get.description: Retrieve all members of a project with their roles.

put.description: Update the role of a project member.

delete.description: Remove a member from the project.

post.description: Create a new todo within a project.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of todos within a project. Supports search, sorting, and pagination.

delete.description: Delete multiple todos by comma-separated UUIDs in the query string. Maximum 50 IDs per request.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of todo UUIDs to delete (max 50)

get.description: Retrieve a specific todo by ID.

put.description: Update a specific todo by ID.

delete.description: Delete a specific todo by ID.

post.description: Create a custom role with specific permissions within an organization.

get.description: Retrieve all roles (system and custom) for an organization.
Retrieve a specific role and its associated permissions.

put.description: Update a custom role's name, description, or permissions. System roles cannot be modified.

delete.description: Delete a custom role. System roles cannot be deleted.

post.description: Send an invitation to join an organization. Specify the invitee by username or email.

get.description: Retrieve all invitations for an organization.

post.description: Send an invitation to join a project. Specify the invitee by username or email.

get.description: Retrieve all pending invitations for the authenticated user.

post.description: Accept a pending invitation to join an organization or project.

delete.description: Revoke a pending invitation. Only users with appropriate permissions can revoke invitations.

get.description: Retrieve the full list of available permissions that can be assigned to roles.
Returns service health status. In production, uptime and database details are omitted. Mounted before rate limiting so load balancers are not throttled.

AccessToken.name: access_token
AccessToken.description: JWT access token (httpOnly cookie set by server)

RefreshToken.name: refresh_token
RefreshToken.description: JWT refresh token (httpOnly cookie set by server)

X-Request-Id.description: Correlation ID for request tracing. Accepts a valid UUID or generates one.

created_by.description: User ID of the organization creator
User ID of the project creator

user_id.description: User ID of the todo creator

is_system.description: Whether this is a system-defined role (cannot be modified or deleted)

permissions.description: List of permissions assigned to this role

project_id.description: Project the invitation is for (null for org-level invitations)

inviter_id.description: User ID of who sent the invitation

invitee_email.description: Email of the invited user (if invited by email)

invitee_id.description: User ID of the invited user (if invited by username)

username.description: Unique username (3-30 characters, alphanumeric and . _ - only)

password.description: Password (8-72 characters, must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character)

RefreshResponseData.description: Empty — new tokens are set as httpOnly cookies, not returned in the body.

role_id.description: ID of the role to assign

permissions.description: Array of permission IDs to assign to the role
Array of permission IDs to assign to the role

username.description: Username of the user to invite (use username or email, not both)

email.description: Email of the user to invite (use username or email, not both)

username.description: Username of the user to invite (use username or email, not both)

email.description: Email of the user to invite (use username or email, not both)

token.description: Invitation token received by the invitee (64-character hex string)

example.message: You do not have permission to perform this action
